name: Nintendo 3DS
description: Nintendo's stereoscopic 3D handheld platform and successor to the DS. Known for strong Nintendo franchise entries, digital support, and backward compatibility with DS games.

eras.title: 3D Recovery Era
eras.description: Launch and early recovery period where major Nintendo releases establish the platform after a slow start.

eras.title: Mature Handheld Era
eras.description: Strong late handheld period with RPGs, remakes, franchise sequels, and continued digital support.
